body: Phase 2: move Frictionless profile pins to 2.0. Vendoring blocker cleared — FineType's self-contained 2.0 profile reused verbatim at vendor/frictionless/datapackage-profile.json; both pins (datapackage.rs, relate.rs) flipped to profiles/2.0. NEW blocker found: 2.0 enforces relative resource.path (pattern forbids leading / . ~ file:), but survey/relate emit the absolute source path. Conformance test now fails on all 7 fixtures. Needs a path-semantics decision: emit basename vs descriptor-relative path. SQL load is already decoupled (carries its own absolute source), so descriptor.path can change without affecting load behaviour.

Resolved. Re-vendored FineType's self-contained 2.0 profile verbatim; both pins flipped to profiles/2.0. Path blocker fixed: resource.path now relative (basename, descriptor co-located with single source), conformant under the 2.0 path pattern; survey assemble + relate both fixed. FineType point-3 (enum-on-boolean) N/A — dovetail emits no constraints. cargo test -p dovetail-core: 29 passed; workspace builds clean.
